mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_session ( session_id, algorithm_code, dataset_id, feature_columns_json, label_column, hyper_params_json, train_config_json, status, current_step, max_steps, loss, metrics_json, parameters_json, predictions_json, visualization_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{algorithmCode}, #{datasetId}, #{featureColumnsJson}, #{labelColumn}, #{hyperParamsJson}, #{trainConfigJson}, #{status}, #{currentStep}, #{maxSteps}, #{loss}, #{metricsJson}, #{parametersJson}, #{predictionsJson}, #{visualizationJson}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE training_session SET algorithm_code = #{algorithmCode}, dataset_id = #{datasetId}, feature_columns_json = #{featureColumnsJson}, label_column = #{labelColumn}, hyper_params_json = #{hyperParamsJson}, train_config_json = #{trainConfigJson}, status = #{status}, current_step = #{currentStep}, max_steps = #{maxSteps}, loss = #{loss}, metrics_json = #{metricsJson}, parameters_json = #{parametersJson}, predictions_json = #{predictionsJson}, visualization_json = #{visualizationJson}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: SELECT session_id, algorithm_code, dataset_id, feature_columns_json, label_column, hyper_params_json, train_config_json, status, current_step, max_steps, loss, metrics_json, parameters_json, predictions_json, visualization_json, created_at, updated_at FROM training_session WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
